_comment_root: manage-strictdoc server configuration. Edit this file via menu 5 (Edit config). See README for path placeholder syntax.
_comment_overview: Required: project_path. Optional with defaults: host (127.0.0.1); port (5111); open_browser (true); output_path (empty=strictdoc default).
_comment_project_path: Absolute path to the StrictDoc project root (folder with .sdoc files). Path placeholders supported (replaced at first run / config init): USERNAME placeholder -> current Windows username; STARTER_ROOT placeholder -> the folder containing manage-strictdoc.bat. Bundled samples: samples/hello-strictdoc (5 reqs, small template for editing); samples/sovd-automotive (~100 reqs, SOVD automotive with ASIL/Layer/Type custom fields, current default).
_comment_host: Server bind host. Allowed: IPv4 dotted-decimal (e.g. 127.0.0.1, 0.0.0.0), 'localhost', or IPv6 literal (e.g. ::, ::1). 127.0.0.1 = local only (recommended). 0.0.0.0 and :: = LAN exposed (browser open auto-translates to 127.0.0.1).
_comment_port: Server port (1024..65535). Default 5111 = strictdoc default. Change to run multiple instances in parallel (use separate StrictDocStarter folders).
_comment_open_browser: Auto-open default browser to http://host:port/ after Start succeeds. true|false.
_comment_output_path: strictdoc --output-path. Leave empty to use strictdoc default (project/output). Same path placeholders as project_path (USERNAME, STARTER_ROOT) supported.
